summary: Tested Housekeeping push notifications feature. All UI components correctly implemented: notification bell icon visible in header, notification panel opens on click, shows 'Aucune notification' when empty, Gouvernante view has 3 tabs (Validation/Équipe/Stocks) working, Mobile Femme de chambre view has timer and Terminer button. Backend NestJS emits cleaning_completed event when task is completed. WebSocket falls back to HTTP polling (real-time push not working via proxy).

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails and falls back to HTTP polling. Real-time push notifications won't work until WebSocket is properly configured through the Kubernetes ingress/proxy.
minor.note: The cleaning_completed event is correctly emitted by NestJS (line 157 in housekeeping.service.ts), but WebSocket connection through proxy is not established

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to Pydantic validation error - this is the LEGACY API, not V2

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection fails (wss://...socket.io) - falls back to HTTP polling. Notifications won't appear in real-time until WebSocket proxy is configured.

passed_tests: Notification icon (bell) visible in header next to 'V2 Temps réel' - SUCCESS
Notification trigger button has data-testid='notifications-trigger' - SUCCESS
Click on notification icon opens panel - SUCCESS
Notification panel has data-testid='notifications-panel' - SUCCESS
Panel shows 'Aucune notification' when empty - SUCCESS
V2 Temps réel toggle visible and active - SUCCESS
Gouvernante view - Validation tab with 3 pending inspections - SUCCESS
Gouvernante view - Équipe tab with 4 team members - SUCCESS
Gouvernante view - Stocks tab with 1 alert - SUCCESS
Gouvernante view - Valider button opens dialog with 5 rating stars - SUCCESS
Gouvernante view - Refuser button visible - SUCCESS
Mobile Femme de chambre view - Timer running (108:15) - SUCCESS
Mobile Femme de chambre view - Terminer button opens dialog - SUCCESS
Mobile Femme de chambre view - Confirmer completes task with toast 'Nettoyage terminé' - SUCCESS
Direction view - KPIs (40 rooms, 78% occupancy, 8 départs, 13 recouches) - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/housekeeping/stats - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/housekeeping/tasks - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/housekeeping/tasks/{taskId}/start - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/housekeeping/tasks/{taskId}/complete - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/rooms - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/staff - SUCCESS
Backend: All 16 pytest tests passed - SUCCESS
action_items: Configure WebSocket proxy in Kubernetes ingress to enable real-time push notifications (currently WebSocket connection fails and falls back to HTTP polling)
critical_code_review_comments: HousekeepingNotifications component correctly implemented with data-testid attributes
useHousekeepingV2 hook correctly handles cleaning_completed WebSocket event (lines 137-158)
housekeeping.service.ts correctly calls emitCleaningCompletedNotification on task completion (line 157)
WebSocket falls back to HTTP polling gracefully - data loads correctly but real-time push won't work

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI components working, WebSocket fallback to polling)

seed_data_creation: NestJS has demo data: 40 rooms, 21 tasks, 9 staff, 5 inspections (3 pending, 1 validated, 1 refused)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Housekeeping notifications feature fully implemented. UI components work correctly (bell icon, panel, empty state). Backend emits cleaning_completed event. WebSocket connection fails through proxy and falls back to HTTP polling - real-time push notifications won't work until WebSocket proxy is configured. All other features (Gouvernante tabs, Mobile view, Direction KPIs) working correctly.

notifications.sound_toggle: Volume icon visible in panel header
notifications.websocket: Falls back to HTTP polling - real-time push not working

mobile_v2.terminer_button: Opens dialog with photo upload and notes

direction_v2.floor_plan: Room chips by floor with color coding

websocket_issue_details.fallback: Socket.io falls back to HTTP polling mode
websocket_issue_details.impact: Real-time push notifications won't appear instantly - requires page refresh or polling interval
websocket_issue_details.root_cause: WebSocket not configured through Kubernetes ingress/proxy
websocket_issue_details.recommendation: Configure WebSocket upgrade in ingress or expose NestJS WebSocket directly
